acceptance_checks: At least four current/public sources or local evidence rows are recorded.
At least four trend themes are mapped to offer-fit and risk notes.
At least seven calendar entries are present.
Every calendar entry has no-post/no-CTA state.
Public posting, Fiverr account actions, proposals, payments, and model/API calls remain zero.
Recommended next step is a local draft review packet, not public action.

internal_outline: Good agent offers start with workflow boundaries.
The sellable artifact is a scoped map plus acceptance tests.
calendar.working_title: Why AI-agent gigs fail before the first prompt

internal_outline: Name three gates: credentials, payments, public actions.
Explain why boundaries increase buyer trust.
calendar.working_title: The human part of AI service work is deciding what not to automate

internal_outline: Assistant adds retrieval and memory constraints.
Creator model requires platform/tool eligibility and rights review.
calendar.working_title: Prompt pack vs assistant vs creator model
A sane AI-agent workflow audit deliverable
AI video is not a button, it is a review pipeline
What buyers probably mean when they ask for AI help
Turn a messy inbox process into an AI-ready SOP

internal_outline: What artifact do you own at the end?
calendar.working_title: Five questions before buying an AI-agent gig

recommended_next_local_proof: Create a no-post draft review packet for the first three calendar entries with tone checks, source links, forbidden claims, and exact approval gates before any X/Fiverr/public action.

observations: Fiverr CEO framed AI fluency as a non-negotiable work skill.
Reported Fiverr Business Trends Index signals included AI Agent searches up 18,347% and AI Video Creator searches up 1,739% over six months.
Mentioned fast-moving roles included vibe coders, agent trainers, and ComfyUI consultants.
Fiverr Go lets vetted creators train AI models on their own work.
Clients can buy generated work while creators keep control over their model and pricing.
Fiverr Go also includes an AI assistant trained on prior customer interactions.
Fiverr publicly shifted toward an AI-first company posture in 2025.
The shift reinforces that content should speak to operators adapting to AI, not generic freelance advice.
Recent firm-level research studies substitution between online labor marketplaces and generative AI spending.
Useful framing: buyers are looking for leverage and cost savings, so content should map AI services to concrete business outcomes.
Prior local packet selected agent workflow skill packaging as the recommended first Fiverr-like service bundle.
No Fiverr account, gig, client outreach, model/MCP call, or public action was approved.

summary: Current Fiverr-adjacent signals support a local content calendar around AI-agent services, AI video workflows, creator-owned AI assets, and human judgment after AI. The packet creates draft angles only; no account, proposal, post, reply, outreach, listing, or payment action occurred.

trend_themes.angle: Explain how to scope small agent workflows with clear handoff, evidence, and kill criteria.
trend_themes.offer_fit: agent workflow audit, workflow map, local automation spec
trend_themes.risk: Avoid claiming autonomous execution or income results.
trend_themes.signal: Reported demand spike for AI Agent services.

trend_themes.angle: Compare AI video as a workflow with script, asset, rights, QA, and publishing gates.
trend_themes.offer_fit: video production checklist, prompt pack, QA rubric
trend_themes.risk: Avoid using copyrighted likenesses, music, or client assets without approval.
trend_themes.signal: Reported demand spike for AI Video Creator searches.

trend_themes.angle: Position expert-owned templates, voice, and QA as the defensible layer around AI output.
trend_themes.offer_fit: brand-safe prompt library, personal assistant FAQ map, reusable model brief
trend_themes.risk: Avoid promising model training access or platform eligibility.
trend_themes.signal: Fiverr Go coverage emphasizes creator-trained models and assistants.

trend_themes.angle: Show before/after examples where human review changes vague AI output into usable business artifacts.
trend_themes.offer_fit: AI workflow review, decision memo, implementation checklist
trend_themes.risk: Avoid generic AI hype; show specific constraints and review gates.
trend_themes.signal: AI-first labor-market commentary still values nuance and judgment.

trend_themes.angle: Translate AI tools into operating routines: intake, output review, approvals, and metrics.
trend_themes.offer_fit: small business AI ops calendar, SOP pack, automation backlog
trend_themes.risk: Avoid regulated advice or handling client credentials.
trend_themes.signal: Research and marketplace signals point to businesses buying leverage, not tools.
